biological_replicate: from patients diagnosed with DCM and end-stage HF who underwent heart transplantation (n=7)
technical_replicate: the expression of lnc4012 in these samples was detected by qRT-PCR.
experimental_design: treated vs control in LADL-induced ischemia
the effects of HHQ16 on HF mice caused by the left anterior descending coronary artery ligation (LADL)-induced ischemia
factor_value: the mice were subsequently treated by daily gavage with control solvent or HHQ16
